# Flagellum Dei

> A dark historical horror tabletop RPG companion app set in 1340 AD. Create characters, run scenarios, and play offline-first with realtime multiplayer.

Flagellum Dei is a free, ad-free companion for a medieval horror RPG. All lore is handwritten. The app works offline (PWA) and supports remote play with a Game Master and players.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing the game, world, and play modes.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account creation and login.
- [Install](/install): How to install the app as a PWA on desktop and mobile.
